libsource.description: Generic connector, single row, 01x03, script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)
Generic connector, double row, 02x05, odd/even pin numbering scheme (row 1 odd numbers, row 2 even numbers), script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)
Generic connector, single row, 01x05, script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)
Generic connector, single row, 01x02, script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)
Generic connector, single row, 01x02, script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)
LAN8720 Ethernet PHY with RMII interface, QFN-24
1A Low Dropout regulator, positive, 3.3V fixed output, SOT-223
Compact AC/DC board mount power module 3W 5V
Four pin crystal, GND on pins 2 and 3

Compact AC/DC board mount power module 3W 5V
Four pin crystal, GND on pins 2 and 3
LAN8720 Ethernet PHY with RMII interface, QFN-24
1A Low Dropout regulator, positive, 3.3V fixed output, SOT-223
